source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Dizziness
source.population: People presenting with dizziness; age limits are not stated in the applicability section.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for Dubai telehealth dizziness documentation; partial for a general in-person GP workflow.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Specifies symptom description, timing, triggers, concurrent symptoms, age, and pre-existing conditions.

items.rationale: The exact DHA dizziness history section supports onset, duration, severity or impact, associated symptoms, relevant negatives and clinician risk context without inferring a vestibular, cardiovascular or neurological cause.

items.final_wording: Lists cardiac, neurologic, trauma, intoxication, visual, consciousness, and severe-headache concerns.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Dizziness

items.rationale: The exact red-flag section supports recording vital data, appearance and time-critical symptoms only when assessed.

items.final_wording: States that tests depend on history and examination and should be documented only when clinically deemed necessary.
